vibe: Elite, structured, transparent, high-end, cyber-industrial premium, cinematic OS

layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, labels, tabular data. Center hero only if visually balanced.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10 z-50
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat background (bg-[#0A0A0A]), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg
surfaces.marketing_cards: Grid Borders: border-collapse style layout, border-r border-b border-white/10
surfaces.buttons: Square edges, sharp. Explicit text color change on hover (e.g., hover:bg-white hover:text-black for primary buttons, hover:bg-white/10 for secondary). Focus uses accent red (#FF3B30) ring.

animation.transitions: transition-transform duration-300 ease-out, transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out
animation.hover_states: Explicit text color on hover. Active elements tint borders toward background hue.

marketing.strategy: Pure HTML + Tailwind CSS. Raw div/section for overlapping/asymmetry. Do not use Shadcn structure for hero. Use fluid wide gaps.
marketing.marquee: The 'Kinetic Texture' - Massive outline text running in the background for high energy sections using JetBrains Mono.

dashboard.strategy: Shadcn/UI components heavily customized (rounded-none, sharp borders). Pure dense data focus.
dashboard.card: Avoid Shadcn Card default. Go cardless or flat rectangular with 1px border-white/10.
dashboard.forms: Use Shadcn Form, Input, Select. Square inputs, dark bg, border-white/10.
dashboard.tables: Left aligned text, 1px border bottoms, clear hover states for rows.

image_urls.description: Tall building shrouded in fog at night. Use as dark atmospheric background for the Market page hero.
Laptop showing code. Use in the Production Layer section or Developer Hub.
Man using computer. Use in the Quality Layer or Tester Hub.
Modern dark conference room. Use for the Client Hub or 'Control Layer' sections.
Microsoft logo. Use for integrations or client list section.
Google logo. Use for integrations or client list section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme #0A0A0A base background. Do not use generic grey-blues. The look is deep Obsidian, White, and Signal Red accents.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Cabinet Grotesk', 'Space Grotesk' or another distinct Sans Serif display font. Add tracking-tighter.
Borders must be sharp (rounded-none). No friendly corners. The system is brutal, clear, and authoritative.
Use 'p-8' padding universally inside cards with borders to prevent text collision. White space is critical.
All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-white hover:text-black) and focus states with the accent red (#FF3B30).
Use grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8) for marketing sections, mimicking a 'Tetris' grid layout with asymmetrical spans (col-span-8, col-span-4).
Dashboards should use 'Control Room' grid (grid-cols-4) with gap-6. Every pixel utilized. No empty jagged bottoms.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) like `data-testid="login-form-submit-button"`.
Market/Landing page needs high visual impact, use motion and scroll effects. The vibe is a 'cinematic OS' showing the transparent connection between Client and Production.
Dashboard layers (Client Hub, Dev Hub, Tester Hub, Admin) prioritize density and data clarity. Eliminate all unnecessary UI chrome.

Do not use generic blue buttons. Use stark white buttons with black text, or stark black buttons with white borders. Accent Red (#FF3B30) is reserved for kinetic triggers, errors, or primary progress indicators.
Ensure 'lucide-react' icons are used uniformly with 'strokeWidth={1.5}' for a sleek, lightweight look.
